name: Sidra

migrationPath.notes: Genetic origin confirmed as Ethiopian Landrace through testing
First identified and named in Ecuador
Now also found in Colombian farms

notableProducers: Miller Sarmiento (Santa María, Huila, Colombia — blended with Pink Bourbon)
description: Sidra has Ethiopian genetic origins but was first identified and named in Ecuador. Like Pink Bourbon and Chiroso, it belongs to the broad 'Ethiopian Landrace' classification without more specific resolution — the global database doesn't yet have enough sequences to distinguish its exact lineage. It shares flavor characteristics with other Ethiopian-origin varieties: floral, sweet, and fruit-forward. It sometimes appears blended with Pink Bourbon when individual lot sizes are too small to sell separately.
